subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, that the call of God may draw him unto the throne of his Lord. Verily, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله لیجذبه ندآء الله الی عرش مولاه ان ربک
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
